evidence.claim: Expertise in OpenSearch, Haystack, Forecasting, Elasticsearch, Semantic Search, CNN, LangChain, Time Series, Python, RAG, Fine-tuning LLMs, Hugging Face Transformers, GraphQL, Sentence Transformers, and Qdrant.
evidence.source_text: Skills: OpenSearch (expert, 44mo, 38 endorsements); Haystack (advanced, 32mo, 38 endorsements); Forecasting (advanced, 25mo, 1 endorsements); Elasticsearch (expert, 71mo, 39 endorsements); Semantic Search (expert, 63mo, 3 endorsements); CNN (intermediate, 23mo, 0 endorsements); LangChain (expert, 79mo, 13 endorsements); Time Series (advanced, 42mo, 52 endorsements); Python (advanced, 43mo, 60 endorsements); RAG (expert, 58mo, 52 endorsements); Fine-tuning LLMs (expert, 43mo, 22 endorsements); Hugging Face Transformers (expert, 52mo, 19 endorsements); GraphQL (beginner, 14mo, 13 endorsements); Sentence Transformers (advanced, 24mo, 14 endorsements); Qdrant (expert, 76mo, 32 endorsements)

evidence.claim: Developed semantic search for 500K documents using sentence-transformers and FAISS.
evidence.source_text: Developed a semantic search feature for an internal knowledge base of ~500K documents. Used sentence-transformers (all-MiniLM-L6-v2 initially, later upgraded to bge-base) with FAISS for fast nearest-neighbor retrieval.

evidence.claim: Built content recommendation system for 10M+ users using collaborative filtering, content-based ranking, and gradient-boosted models.
evidence.source_text: Built a content recommendation system serving 10M+ users that combined collaborative filtering with content-based ranking. The system uses item-item similarity (via sentence-transformer embeddings) for cold starts and a gradient-boosted model trained on engagement signals for warm users.

evidence.claim: Improved search-relevance by 35% over Elasticsearch BM25.
evidence.source_text: Reported search-relevance improvement of 35% over the prior Elasticsearch BM25 setup, validated through human relevance judgments.

evidence.claim: Improved 7-day retention by 6% and time spent per session by 14% via recommendation system launch.
evidence.source_text: The launch improved 7-day retention by 6% and time spent per session by 14%.

evidence.claim: Acted as de-facto ML lead on a small team.
evidence.source_text: Recently, I've been the de-facto ML lead on a small team, shipping models across NLP and recsys.

evidence.claim: Earned AWS Certified Machine Learning Specialty and NLP Specialization.
evidence.source_text: Certifications: AWS Certified Machine Learning Specialty (AWS, 2018); NLP Specialization (Coursera/DeepLearning.AI, 2022)

evidence.claim: Believes most retrieval problems are evaluation problems in disguise.
evidence.source_text: I've learned that most retrieval problems are actually evaluation problems in disguise.

evidence.claim: Prioritizes learning from shipping real systems over academic theory.
evidence.source_text: My academic background is in CS/ML but my main learning has come from shipping real systems and seeing what holds up under production load.
